svg.title: DVR complete flowchart from query arrival to final verified answer
svg.desc: Eight block flowchart showing DVR flow: pre-generation setup, draft generation, BERT encoding, skip decision, verifier selection, verification, loop check, and final evaluation.

g.text: Start: query arrives
Block 1: before any generation begins
Read incoming query text
Estimate query complexity from token length
Identify query domain
Identify stage identity s: Exploration, Reasoning, Conclusion
Load fixed system constants: C(v), L(v), L(draft), E(v), E(draft), T_max
Attach system prompt instructing draft model to emit boundary tokens
Block 2: draft model generates subtask s
Draft model generates tokens continuously
Boundary token fires, generation pauses
Record p(s): raw softmax distributions across all token positions
Compute q(s) from p(s): average peak confidence
Compute H(s) from p(s): average entropy
Count gamma(s): number of tokens generated
Block 3: BERT encoder reads context
Encoder reads query plus completed subtask output together
Produces encoded vector representing combined meaning
Block 4: router skip decision
q(s) >= theta_q AND H(s) <= theta_H ?
v(s) = none
skip
Block 5: router verifier selection decision
Uses: encoded vector, s, query complexity, query domain, C(v)
Selects v(s) from {small, medium, large}
Default: Exploration = small, Reasoning = large, Conclusion = medium or large
Query complexity and domain adjust these defaults
Block 6: verifier checks subtask
If v(s) = none: record alpha(s) = not applicable
Otherwise: assigned verifier checks subtask draft
Record alpha(s): token acceptance rate
Block 7: is this the last subtask?
s = Conclusion ?
Block 8: all three subtasks complete
Compute total cost: C(v) and gamma(s) across all subtasks
Compute total latency: L(draft), L(v), gamma(s) across all subtasks
Compute total energy: E(draft), E(v), gamma(s) across all subtasks
Check quality: Acc(v(E),v(R),v(C)) >= Acc(L,L,L) minus delta
delta = 0.05, calibrated via LTT (CALM, Schuster et al. 2022)
End: final verified answer
